title: TetraClip
description: a lib about tetra optimization,compat and bugfix
body:
This mod introduces optimizations for the Tetra mod, along with other compatibility enhancements and bug fixes.
## Tetra
1. ‌Added a slider to Tetra's workbench screen for easier viewing of status displayed at the top of the screen.
![Slider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26537c11560b4e693001752e076d4ec57676f7a8.png)
2. Now you can Press [ + ]/[ - ] to flip through weapon parts stats.
![status](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc8eba597ba7fd6d671356e0ec6e943dd2c740f9.png)
## Art of Forging
1. Fixed The issue of "damage caused by Judgement not belong to player damage".
2. Fixed The issue of "damage caused by Esoteric Edge not belong to player damage".
3. Improved the detection logic of Goliath Slayer for target entities
